rationale.R1.2: The review identifies multiple inconsistencies and proposes specific fixes, demonstrating a thorough understanding of the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: While the review highlights uncertainty regarding the portability claim and AUC-to-accuracy inference, it doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty for individual recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the scope of the analysis, identifying a potential drift in the portability claim compared to the training procedure.
rationale.RX.4: The review points out potential regressions related to the cost calculation and class balancing, but doesn't identify any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The review lacks specific annotations on the provenance and traceability of changes proposed.
